$schema: iter-30B Stage 2 — three distinct mood-board directions per industry.
$contract: Each industry maps to a list of exactly THREE direction objects.
Each direction REPLACES (not blends with) the curator's atmosphere palette and parti-pris when overlaid on the same selection.
The curator still picks the materials/furniture/plants/lights ; the direction picks the colour DNA + the design philosophy that recasts those products.
Directions for the demo industry (tech_startup) are tuned. Other industries fall back to a generic three-direction set if no entry exists ; see _DEFAULT_DIRECTIONS in app.surfaces.visual_moodboard.
Stable `slug` keys are used as URL/cache discriminators — keep them lowercase ASCII, dash-separated, never rename without a migration.

tech_startup.name: Atelier Nord
tech_startup.tagline: A workshop on north light. Focus + craft, not a startup grid.
tech_startup.parti_pris: Architect-studio aesthetic — long oak workbenches stretched against the north façade, black steel partitions, linen acoustic panels, brass detailing. Editorial calm. Library-quiet during deep work, social only at the central café-townhall. The reference is a 6th-arrondissement architecture practice, not a tech open-plan.
tech_startup.atmosphere_cue: north-facing oak workbenches, linen acoustic panels, black steel-frame partitions, café-townhall under daylight, editorial calm, soft shadow play
tech_startup.lighting_cue: single-source soft north daylight, no overhead fluorescents, warm 3000 K accents at the café

tech_startup.name: Studio Tokyo
tech_startup.tagline: Quiet rigour. Raw plaster, charcoal, the warmth of a single timber.
tech_startup.parti_pris: Minimal Japanese workshop — washi-paper diffusion screens, hand-troweled lime-plaster walls, tatami-edge proportions, charred-cedar (yakisugi) accents. Indigo as the single coloured note. Almost monastic. Inspired by Tadao Ando's office in Osaka and the Aesop concept stores.
tech_startup.atmosphere_cue: tatami-edge proportions, washi-paper screens, hand-troweled lime walls, charred-cedar shelving, single indigo banner, monastic silence
tech_startup.lighting_cue: diffused light through washi screens, low-hanging single Akari pendant, 2700 K ambient, dawn-quiet

tech_startup.name: Loft Parisien
tech_startup.tagline: A 9th-arrondissement library reframed as an atelier.
tech_startup.parti_pris: Haussmannian conversion — herringbone walnut floors, deep emerald moulded panelling, brushed-brass library lamps, cream stucco ceilings, vintage Cassina or Knoll signature pieces. Reference: Pierre Yovanovitch's Paris office or the Maison Sauvage interiors. Refined, slightly aristocratic, warm despite its formality.
tech_startup.atmosphere_cue: herringbone walnut, emerald moulded panels, brushed-brass library lamps, cream stucco mouldings, oxblood leather Cassina chairs, archival prints framed in gold
tech_startup.lighting_cue: warm tungsten 2700 K library lamps, brass cone shades, deep cast shadows, candlelight feel for the lounge

law_firm.name: Library Deep
law_firm.tagline: Mahogany, leather, the weight of a hundred volumes.
law_firm.parti_pris: Old-school senior partner aesthetic — Farrow & Ball Card Room Green panelled walls, Dinesen Douglas oak, walnut bookcases, oxblood Chesterfield seating, brass library lamps, antique Persian runner. Heritage without nostalgia.
law_firm.atmosphere_cue: panelled green walls, walnut bookcases, oxblood Chesterfield, antique Persian rug, leather-bound volumes, brass desk lamps
law_firm.lighting_cue: tungsten library lamps 2700 K, single-bulb cone shades, deep shadows, candlelit feel

law_firm.name: Modernist London
law_firm.tagline: Restraint. Stone, oak, a single charcoal note.
law_firm.parti_pris: John Pawson restraint — pale Portland stone floors, white-washed oak, charcoal upholstery, no decoration, slow geometry. References David Chipperfield's London chambers.
law_firm.atmosphere_cue: Portland stone floors, white-washed oak, slow geometry, charcoal upholstered Vitsoe shelving, bronze handles, no surplus
law_firm.lighting_cue: long horizontal cove lighting 3000 K, no point sources, even wash

law_firm.name: Atelier Paris Haute
law_firm.tagline: Quiet authority. Stucco, walnut, a single emerald.
law_firm.parti_pris: Same Haussmannian elegance as `loft-parisien` but tuned for the law firm — herringbone walnut, cream stucco, deep emerald moulded panelling, oxblood leather, archival framed prints, Cassina or Pierre Jeanneret signature seating.
law_firm.atmosphere_cue: herringbone walnut floors, emerald moulded panels, oxblood leather Cassina chairs, archival prints in gold frames, brass library lamps
law_firm.lighting_cue: warm tungsten 2700 K, brass cone shades, library calm

creative_agency.name: Berlin Loft
creative_agency.tagline: Plaster, plywood, a single acid yellow.
creative_agency.parti_pris: Mitte creative-studio rawness — exposed plaster, raw plywood shelving, terracotta-tile floor, mohair bouclé seating, art books stacked everywhere, dieter-rams-era lighting. Acid yellow as the only saturated note.
creative_agency.atmosphere_cue: exposed plaster walls, raw plywood shelving, Mutina Margarita terracotta tile, mohair bouclé seating, lived-in stacks of art books
creative_agency.lighting_cue: Anglepoise + Castiglioni Toio, warm 2700 K + 3000 K mixed, raw bulbs visible

creative_agency.name: Milan Atelier
creative_agency.tagline: Travertine, brass, the discipline of an Italian editor.
creative_agency.parti_pris: Milanese design-studio polish — travertine surfaces, brushed-brass detailing, oxblood leather Cassina chairs, vintage Sottsass details, deep navy accents, Gio Ponti silhouettes.
creative_agency.atmosphere_cue: travertine table tops, brushed brass legs, oxblood Cassina lounge, deep navy curtains, Gio Ponti chairs, vintage Sottsass ceramic
creative_agency.lighting_cue: Flos Arco floor lamps, warm 2700 K, theatrical pools

creative_agency.name: Tokyo Mono
creative_agency.tagline: Concrete, cedar, the silence between the notes.
creative_agency.parti_pris: Same minimalist Japanese workshop as `studio-tokyo` (tech_startup) but tuned for a creative agency — washi screens, charred cedar, raw concrete shear walls, indigo accent, Akari Noguchi pendants.
creative_agency.atmosphere_cue: raw concrete shear walls, charred cedar shelving, washi-paper screens, Akari Noguchi pendants, single indigo banner
creative_agency.lighting_cue: diffused through washi, low-hanging Akari, 2700 K dawn calm
